title: An agent_versions pin that doesn't match the running build fails fast
description: agent_versions maps descriptor.agent_name to an exact descriptor.agent_version the Commission was authored against. A pin for the running agent that doesn't equal its actual version is a contract violation (same-name surfaces can change behavior across builds): the agent MUST emit error_occurred with code unsupported_agent_version and stop with reason error BEFORE any model turn (no assistant_message). The ${AGENT_NAME} fixture token keys the pin at the agent under test; the pinned value is a version no real build reports.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
